MLB Workspace

Choose your baseball page and keep the bounty board front and center.

This MLB home page now acts as the sport landing page inside the shared site. From here, users can jump into the daily prediction board, read how the board is built, or switch sports from the hub.

Open MLB Predictions How This Board Works

Current Experience

  • Shared landing page lets users pick a sport first.
  • MLB has its own home page and navigation drawer.
  • Prediction pages keep the wanted-poster bounty feel.

Start with a page, then stay inside the sport.

Prediction About

See how the MLB board is filtered, ranked, and trimmed down for a tighter hit-focused pool.
